productDisplayName: Ed Hardy Love & Luck Men Perfumes
description: Straight from ed hardy's Love & Luck collection comes this Love Is A Gamble perfume: a vintage tattoo-inspired fragrant cologne sensation for men. This Eau De Toilette comes in a cylindrical bottle that is packed in a case which has a psychedellic explosion of the tattoo from Christian Audigier himself. The bottle and case feature graphics of cards, dice and coins, reinforcing the theme of the collection.This bottle contains notes of bergamot, orange, mandarin, cardamom, absinthe, sage, cypress, violet, cedar wood, dark vetiver and agarwood.Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
